footer.vision: Have a vision? Let's bring it to life with modern code.

hero.subtitle: has never been easier

json.title: Convert JSON → Excel

googleSheetsPanel.invalidUrl: Please enter a Google Sheets URL
googleSheetsPanel.notGoogleSheets: URL must be a Google Sheets link
googleSheetsPanel.invalidId: Could not extract ID from this URL

jsonToExcelPanel.invalidFile: Please select at least one .json file
jsonToExcelPanel.dropTitle: Drag and drop JSON files here

getLink.invalidUrl: Please enter a Google Sheets URL

getLink.invalidId: Could not extract ID from this URL
getLink.excelReadError: Error reading Excel file, please try again.

page.defaultError: Could not load spreadsheet. Please check the ID.

emptyState.adjustFilter: Try adjusting your filters or search keywords.

sheet.emptyDesc: No keywords in this category yet. Start by adding your first one!

addForm.keyDesc: Enter key to identify translation (e.g., home.title, button.save)
addForm.translationDesc: Enter translation for each language. At least one must be non-empty.

errors.keyExists: This key already exists in the sheet
errors.translationEmpty: Must have at least one non-empty translation

exportModal.title: 📦 Export JSON Settings
exportModal.subtitle: Manage fallback languages and check translation progress
exportModal.noFallbackDesc: Keep empty values in JSON files

formatGuide.title: Google Sheets Formatting Guide
formatGuide.subtitle: How to format your Google Sheets to work with this app
formatGuide.ruleKeyColumn: First column must be named KEY or key
formatGuide.ruleUnique: Each KEY must be unique (no duplicates)
formatGuide.ruleAtLeastOne: At least one language column is required
formatGuide.errorMissingKeyFix: Fix: Add the first column named "KEY"
formatGuide.errorEmptyKeyFix: Fix: Fill in the KEY for this row, e.g., "goodbye"
formatGuide.tipNaming: • Keep KEYs short and meaningful: menu.home, button.save
formatGuide.tipEmptyTranslation: • You can leave translations empty while working
formatGuide.tipHeaders: • Language headers can be English, en, EN, Vietnamese, vi

templateCreator.title: Create Beautiful Template
templateCreator.subtitle: Create Google Sheets template with clean and standard format
templateCreator.copySuccess:
📋 Instructions copied to clipboard!

New Google Sheets will open in a new tab.

addLanguage.title: Add New Language
addLanguage.subtitle: Add a new language column to Google Sheets
addLanguage.label: Language name
addLanguage.hint: The language name will become the header column in Google Sheets

deleteLanguage.title: Delete language?
deleteLanguage.description: Are you sure you want to delete language {lang}? This action will PERMANENTLY delete the entire column and associated translation data across all sheets.
deleteLanguage.warning: ⚠️ This step cannot be undone. Only proceed if you are sure what you are doing.

addSheet.title: Create New Category
addSheet.subtitle: Add a new sheet to Google Spreadsheet
addSheet.label: Category name
addSheet.hint: The category name will become a new sheet in Google Spreadsheet

errors.tooShort: Category name must be at least 2 characters
errors.invalidChars: Category name cannot contain special characters: [ ] \ / ? * :

formatWarning.title: Google Sheets Format Warning
formatWarning.subtitle: Phát hiện vấn đề format cần được sửa
formatWarning.summaryDesc: Your Google Sheets has {count} format issues that need to be fixed to be used with this translation app.
formatWarning.summaryTip: Don't worry! We can automatically fix {count} issues for you.
formatWarning.fixableCount: {count} issues can be auto-fixed
formatWarning.actionTitle: What would you like us to do?
formatWarning.actionCancel: Cancel: Close and make no changes
formatWarning.actionView: View & Fix: See details and choose each issue to fix
formatWarning.actionAuto: Auto Fix All: Fix all issues immediately

autoFix.title: Auto-Fix Google Sheets Format
autoFix.subtitle: Automatically fix format errors in Google Sheets
autoFix.summaryDesc: Click "Fix" to automatically fix each issue or "Fix All" to process all at once.

autoTranslate.title: AI Auto-Translate
autoTranslate.subtitle: Automatically translate missing keys using Gemini Flash AI
autoTranslate.enableDesc: Automatically suggest translations when missing translations are detected
autoTranslate.apiKeyDesc: Enter your API key from Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com)
autoTranslate.securityNote: Your API key is stored in your browser (localStorage). We do not store or send your key to our servers.
autoTranslate.missingDesc: These keys have translations for some languages but are missing others
autoTranslate.allCompleteDesc: No missing translations found across all categories
autoTranslate.resultNote: Translations have been updated in memory. Click 'Update' on each row to save to Google Sheets.
autoTranslate.howStep1: Analyzes all categories to find missing translations
autoTranslate.howStep2: Uses existing translations as reference source
autoTranslate.howStep3: Sends translation requests to Gemini Flash AI in batches
autoTranslate.howStep4: Automatically fills in translations for empty fields
autoTranslate.apiKeyMissing: Please configure Gemini API Key first!
autoTranslate.noMissingLanguages: No missing languages left to translate!
autoTranslate.noSourceLanguage: Need at least one translation as source!

deleteModal.title: 🗑️ Delete Category
deleteModal.subtitle: This action cannot be undone
deleteModal.description: All translation data inside this category will be permanently deleted from Google Sheet / Excel.
deleteModal.advice: We recommend exporting the data (Export) before deleting for backup purposes.
